Off Calendar Nov-18-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David M. Zeff, Esq. of the Law Offices of David M. Zeff, T:415.923.1380, for plaintiff/moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Hearing was held on Plaintiff Frederick Fiechter's Motion For Assignment And Charging Orders. After hearing, and to the satisfaction of the Court,

Plaintiff Frederick C. Fiechter's motion for assignment and charging orders against Defendant Carl Wescott is granted. Plaintiff holds two judgments against Defendant, a vexatious litigant: (1) a July 14, 2015 judgment in the amount of $569,901.33 in principal, accrued interest as of July 24, 2015 in the amount of $407,050.19, and $513,080.79 in attorney's fees and costs; and (2) a September 6, 2011 judgment, renewed on August 28, 2015 in the total amount of $1,822,845.40. Although Defendant apparently served opposition papers on Plaintiff, no opposition was filed with the Court, nor did Plaintiff deliver courtesy copies of any opposition to the Court, as required by the Local Rules. Accordingly, the motion is deemed unopposed.

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
